entries.name: facility-expire-lapsed-bookings
entries.purpose: Every 15 min: transition pending bookings past their 30-min TTL to cancelled.

entries.name: facility-mark-no-show
entries.purpose: Every 30 min: transition confirmed bookings past starts_at + 15 min without check-in to no_show.

entries.name: facility-mark-completed
entries.purpose: Every 30 min: transition confirmed bookings past ends_at + 15 min to completed. Note: rows already marked no_show by the sibling job are skipped.

entries.name: facility-expire-day-passes
entries.purpose: Daily 01:00 UTC: expire day_passes past valid_on_date without consumption. No refund flow.

entries.name: facility-expire-passes
entries.purpose: Daily 02:00 UTC: expire passes past valid_until.

entries.name: facility-purge-soft-deleted
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC: hard-purge soft-deleted facilities past the 7-year retention window.

entries.name: facility-reconcile-orphan-bookings
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 03:00 UTC: catch bookings referencing retired facilities that missed the cascade. Every finding is a P1 signal.

entries.name: facility-reconcile-overlaps
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 03:00 UTC: catch double-bookings that slipped through overlap detection. Every finding is a P1 incident + fires BookingOverlapDetected.

entries.name: facility-redact-anonymous-day-passes
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC: GDPR minimisation. Redact anonymous walk-in profile fields 90 days post-consumed_at.
